teardown: output_base="$(cd "$PASEO_WORKTREE_PATH" && bazel info output_base 2>/dev/null)"; (cd "$PASEO_WORKTREE_PATH" && bazel shutdown 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$output_base" ] && [ -d "$output_base" ] && rm -rf "$output_base" || true
if git rev-parse --verify --quiet "refs/heads/$PASEO_BRANCH_NAME" >/dev/null 2>&1; then git checkout --detach && git branch -D "$PASEO_BRANCH_NAME"; fi
